decision.overall_reasoning: Multiple policy violations: First class domestic flight ($950 exceeds $800 limit and first class not permitted), hotel receipts missing for 3 nights ($960 total without documentation), spa expense ($250) is explicitly non-reimbursable, meals exceed daily limit and description mentions alcohol which is non-reimbursable, limo service ($150) exceeds $100/day transport limit.

expense_decisions.reason: First class not reimbursable per policy; exceeds $800 domestic limit
No receipt attached; exceeds $200/night domestic limit

Exceeds $75/day limit; description mentions alcohol which is non-reimbursable
Spa treatment is explicitly non-reimbursable per policy
Limo service exceeds $100/day transport limit; luxury transport not standard

policy_references.content_snippet: Personal entertainment (movies, spa, gym) are never reimbursable
First class travel is not reimbursable unless medically necessary
Receipts are required for individual expenses over $25
